arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Fabregas makes derby plea to Arteta as Ramsdale opens up on his exit
arts.sum: Arsenal have to plug a hole in their midfield ahead of the North London Derby against Tottenham on Sunday - and Cesc Fabregas has a cunning plan to replace Martin Odegaard

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal only named 22 players in Premier League squad as Mikel Arteta makes major decisions
arts.sum: Arteta's relatively small first team, which lacks members who meet the Home Grown Player (HGP) criteria, is why they cannot fill out the squad. Arsenal submitted their Premier League squad ahead of the season resuming this weekend but have not been able to name the maximum 25 players.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Spurs v Arsenal
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs for Tottenham v Arsenal The post FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Spurs v Arsenal appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers update on Mikel Merino's Arsenal debut
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has given an injury update on summer arrival Mikel Merino, who suffered a fractured shoulder during his first training session with Arsenal. "It is a slow process because it is a bone and it takes a while to heal," he told reporters ahead of Sunday's north London derby.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea legend 'set to join' England coaching staff
arts.sum: England Under-21s boss Carsley was given the call-up to lead the senior Three Lions through UEFA Nations League fixtures against the Republic of Ireland and Finland in September, and is expected to remain at the helm for two further international games at least. Ashley Cole is set to leave Birmingham City and join the Football Association full-time after working alongside Lee Carsley in September.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's reason for Victor Osimhen rejection 'revealed' amid £63.4m hope
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly vetoed a move for Napoli striker Victor Osimhen in the summer transfer window after learning that it would take £109m to prise him away from Italy.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Richarlison 'facing legal action from ex-personal assistant who was used as a dogsbody, worked around the clock and unfairly dumped'
arts.sum: The player is being taken to a tribunal by the individual, who 'feels like he was used as a dogsbody, who worked around the clock, and then was unfairly dumped.'

arts.ttl: Arsenal have quality in their squad to cope with absentees – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: The Gunners could be without three key players for the trip across north London.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes defiant Arsenal claim with Martin Odegaard update for Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Arsenal face a stern test of their squad depth in Sunday's North London derby against old rivals Tottenham as Mikel Arteta is without the suspended Declan Rice and could be missing captain Martin Odegaard too

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling comment to Mikel Arteta convinced Arsenal boss on transfer "in 10 seconds"
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling could make his Arsenal debut in Sunday's North London derby against Tottenham after completing a deadline day loan switch to the Emirates from rivals Chelsea
